title: gaultheria lysolepis
intro: Gaultheria lysolepis, also known as the New Zealand mountain pepper tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Gaultheria lysolepis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, and it has also been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Gaultheria lysolepis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
